tools.name: search_uk_housing_data
tools.description: Display a UK map with housing regulatory data: HMO licensing schemes, advice centres, property tribunal decisions, and local councillors. This tool does NOT search for rental properties, lettings, flats or houses to rent, or property listings. If the user is looking to find or browse rental properties, do NOT call this tool — suggest a property search platform instead. Only call this tool for housing regulation, tenant rights, tribunal cases, HMO licensing, advice centres, or councillor information. Requires a full UK postcode (e.g. 'SW1A 1AA', 'EC1A 1BB'). Do NOT pass place names, partial postcodes, or non-UK postal codes. If the user provides a place name or area instead of a postcode, ask them for their specific UK postcode before calling this tool. Optionally filter by data_types to show specific categories.
